description: A periodic update on project progress, covering accomplishments, upcoming work, risks, and blockers.
distinguishing_characteristics: Contains a reporting period or date
Organized by accomplishments / completed / what was done
Includes upcoming work or next steps

fields.name: project_name
fields.description: Name of the project being reported on

fields.name: overall_status
fields.description: Overall status indicator (Green/Yellow/Red or On Track/At Risk/Off Track)

fields.name: accomplishments
fields.description: Work completed during the reporting period

fields.name: upcoming_work
fields.description: Planned activities for the next period

fields.name: risks_and_issues
fields.description: Active risks or issues with severity and mitigation

fields.name: budget_status
fields.description: Budget utilization or burn rate summary

fields.name: milestone_status
fields.description: Status of key milestones (on track, delayed, completed)
